open Finset BigOperators Matrix MvPolynomial

namespace SymmetricFunctions

variable {N : ℕ} {R : Type*} [CommRing R]

noncomputable def jacobiTrudiMatrixE (lam mu : Fin N → ℕ) : Matrix (Fin N) (Fin N) (MvPolynomial (Fin N) R) :=
  Matrix.of fun i j =>
    esymm (Fin N) R ((lam i : ℤ) - (mu j : ℤ) - (i.val : ℤ) + (j.val : ℤ)).toNat

theorem jacobiTrudi_e (lam mu : NPartition N) :
    schur lam = det (jacobiTrudiMatrixE lam.parts mu.parts) := by
  sorry

end SymmetricFunctions
notes: The theorem statement is a placeholder; the proof is not provided. The definition of jacobiTrudiMatrixE uses esymm with a toNat conversion, assuming the exponent is nonnegative. The transpose of partitions is not used; the statement is simplified to avoid unavailable transpose API.
